docs.creator: Dead & Company
docs.description: Dead & Company Barton Hall Cornell '23 2023-05-08 Ithaca, New York Taper: Eric Lugassy Source:  Channels 1 & 2: AKG c414 XLII Hypercardioids PAS 4" apart >  Channels 3 & 4: Audio Technica 3031 Cardioids PAS 30" apart > Channels 5 & 6: Vanguard V1 Wide-Cardioids PAS 32" apart Zoom F6 32 Bit Float Lineage: SD > Wav > Reaper V6.67 (Tracking/ Normalized/ Slate Digital Plugins) > Flac 24 Bit Location: Slightly off center back of Pit to the left Approximately 14' High What an honor, privilege, and pleasure it was to record this performance. 01. Intro / Tuning 02. New Minglewood Blues 03. Althea 04. Estimated Prophet * > 05 Eyes of the World 06. Jack Straw 07. Bertha > 08. Cassidy > 09. Deal 10. China Cat Sunflower > 11. I Know You Rider 12. Help on the Way > 13. Slipknot! > 14. Franklin's Tower > 15. Drums > 16. Space & Jam > 17. Scarlet Begonias > 18. Fire on the Mountain 19. Morning Dew 20.Terrapin Station * With Get Up, Stand Up (The Wailers) Tease Band Personnel: Bobby Weir - Rhythm Guitar, Lead Vocals Mickey Hart - Percussion, Beam John Mayer - Lead Guitar, Lead Vocals Jeff Chimenti - Keys Oteil Burbridge - Bass Guitar, Percussion Jay Lane - Drums Check out the beneficiaries of this event with the links below: https://www.musicares.org/ https://climate.cornell.edu/

docs.creator: Cowboy Junkies
docs.description: Disc I (Total Time: 51:25:052 (assumes 2s lead-in gap time for track 01, and 0s gap time between remaining tracks)) 01 Applause & Dragging Hooks (Prologue) [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (01:38) 02 Dragging Hooks [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (05:51) 03 Interlude I [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (00:13) 04 Shining Moon [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (04:09) 05 Interlude II [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (00:33) 06 Brand New World [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (05:11) 07 Interlude III [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (00:20) 08 Sing In My Meadow [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (05:59) 09 Interlude IV (Moonlight Mile Backstory) [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (02:53) 10 Moonlight Mile (FOH Gain Shift) [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (05:27) * 11 200 More Miles [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (05:40) 12 Escape Is So Simple [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (05:28) 13 Me And The Devil Blues [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (08:03) Disc II (Total Time: 54:23:054 (assumes 2s lead-in gap time for track 01, and 0s gap time between remaining tracks)) 01 Interlude V [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (00:57) 02 Bea's Song (River Song Trilogy Pt. II) [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (04:27) 03 Interlude VI [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (00:13) 04 Good Friday [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (03:15) 05 Interlude VII (Creative Process Backstory) [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (01:38) 06 Fairy Tale [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (04:30) 07 Interlude VIII (Costume Change) [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (03:16) 08 Angels In The Wilderness [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (05:08) 09 Interlude IX (Satellite On The Bus) [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (00:55) 10 Don't Let It Bring You Down [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (04:11) 11 Interlude X [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (00:08) 12 I Don't Get It [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (03:44) 13 Interlude XI (Recognition & Thanks) [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (04:55) 14 Lost My Driving Wheel [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (06:55) 15 Interlude XII (End Of Set Thanks & Witches Intro) [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (02:21) Encore (2 songs): 16 Witches (Encore, 1st Song) [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (03:08) 17 Interlude XIII (Banter About A Common Disaster) [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (00:10) 18 A Common Disaster (Encore, 2nd Song) [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (04:08) 19 Final Thanks [Engineered For Headphone Use]; (00:24) * "FOH Gain Shift"; There is an abrupt change in gain in this track at 3:30. This is not an issue in the recording, but represents something that was done by the FOH Engineer during the performance. The jump in gain is as noticeable as it is owing to the close proximity of the microphones to the FOH loudspeakers.

docs.creator: Dead & Company
docs.description: Dead & Company Barton Hall Cornell University Ithaca, NY 2023-05-08 Bob Weir / Guitar & Vocals John Mayer / Guitar & Vocals Oteil Burbridge / Bass, Drums & Vocals Jeff Chementi / Keyboard Jay Lane / Drums Mickey Hart / Drums Source: Aud > CCM 41v's and CCM 41's > Lemo Cables > GakCables / Breakouts > Sound Devices Mix Pre 6 II @ 32/48 Lineage: SD 32/48 > Sound Forge Pro 13.0 - Tracking & Editing > Traders Little Helper - Convert to Flac Location: FOB / Vip Pit @ 7ft Recorded By: JT/NY Uploaded By: JT/NY 569johnt@gmail.com Set I 01) New Minglewood Blues 02) Althea 03) Estimated Prophet > 04) Eyes Of The World 05) Jack Straw 06) Bertha 07) Cassidy 08) Deal Set II 09) China Cat Sunflower > 10) I Know You Rider 11) Help On The Way > 12) Slipknot > 13) Franklin's Tower > 14) Drums > 15) Space > 16) Scarlet Begonias > * 17) Fire On The Mountain > 18) Morning Dew 19) Lady With A Fan > 20) Terrapin Station  * West LA Fadeaway tease leading into Scarlet Begonias Proceeds from the concert, a charitable event hosted on the Cornell University campus, benefited the Recording Academy’s MusiCares organization, which provides a safety net of critical health and welfare services to the music industry, and Cornell University’s 2030 Project, in which researchers combine science, scholarship and innovation to develop climate-change solutions.

SET III Universal Pulse (2011) played live for the first time in it's entirety (every other song). 1. Time Bomb 2. Come Original 3. Wild Nights 4. Eons 5. Sunset In July 6. Welcome 7. Trouble 8. You Wouldn't Believe 9. Count Me In 10. Visit 11. Rock On 12. Nutsymtom 13. Weightless 14. All Mixed Up 15. And A Ways To Go SET IV Transistor (1997) played live for the first time in it's entirety. 16. Transistor Intro 17. Transistor 18. Prisoner 19. Galaxy 20. Beautiful Disaster 21. Inner Light Spectrum (Last played 3/11/06) 22. Electricity 23. What Was I Thinking 24. Jupiter 25. Use of Time 26. The Continuous Life (Last played 4/3/08 27. No Control 28. Running 29. Color (Last played 3/11/10) 30. Light Years 31. Creature Feature (Last played 8/11/07) 32. Tune In* (Setlist debut) 33. Rub a Dub 34. Starshines 35. Strangers (Last played 3/11/08) 36. Borders (Last played 11/15/09) 37. Stealing Happy Hours e: 38. Fuck the Bullshit *- There are varying accounts on if this song was played live before tonight. Some say it was played once during the Transistor Tour in 1997, but others disagree. It has never been *confirmed* as being played before tonight. 01. 3.01. Bass Intro 02. 3.02. Time Bomb 03. 3.03. Come Original 04. 3.04. Wild Nights 05. 3.05. Eons 06. 3.06. Sunset in July 07. 3.07. Welcome 08. 3.08. Trouble 09. 3.09. You Wouldn't Believe 10. 3.10. Count Me In 11. 3.11. Visit 12. 3.12. Rock On 13. 3.13. Nutsymptom 14. 3.14. Weightless 15. 3.15. All Mixed Up 16. 3.16. And a Ways To Go 17. 3.17. Fat Chance 18. 4.01. Transistor Intro 19. 4.02. Transistor 20. 4.03. Prisoner 21. 4.04. Galaxy 22. 4.05. Beautiful Disaster 23. 4.06. Inner Light Spectrum 24. 4.07. Electricity 25. 4.08. What Was I Thinking 26. 4.09. Jupiter 27. 4.10. Use of Time 28. 4.11. The Continuous Life 29. 4.12. No Control 30. 4.13. Running 31. 4.14. Color 32. 4.15. Light Years 33. 4.16. Creature Feature 34. 4.17. Tune In 35. 4.18. Rub a Dub 36. 4.19. Starshines 37. 4.20. Strangers 38. 4.21.
